name: Crockpot Cajun Ribs
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the pork ribs in the crockpot.
2. Drain the carrots and place them on top of the ribs.
3. Sprinkle the pressed garlic and pepper over the ribs and carrots.
4. Pour the barbecue sauce over the top.
5. Set the crockpot to low setting and let it cook all day.
